what: Validate and auto-fix LLM-generated knowledge proposals
why: LLM output may have formatting issues (non-kebab tags, long descriptions) that need correction before saving

success_handling.criteria: All proposals pass validation after auto-fixes

decisions.rationale: Better UX to fix common issues automatically than to reject proposals and require regeneration
required_knowledge and optional_knowledge references must point to other proposals in the batch or existing entries
